commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

feat: Stage 2.5 自動補抓候選股分點資料（MomentumScanner）

解決問題：每日 discover 若出現新候選股（不在上次推薦或 watchlist 中），
因無分點資料而被迫降級至較低 factor 數評分，導致評分不公平。

實作方式（最小侵入，與月營收補抓保持一致）：
- pipeline.py: 新增 sync_broker_for_stocks(stock_ids) 包裝函數
  （固定 days=7，覆蓋 _load_broker_data() 的 7 日查詢窗口）
- scanner.py:  MarketScanner 新增 _auto_sync_broker: bool = False 類別變數；
  MomentumScanner 覆寫為 True；
  base run() Stage 2.5 條件式呼叫 sync_broker_for_stocks(candidate_ids)
  （DB 已有 2 日內資料者自動跳過，不重複抓取）
- tests/test_broker.py: 新增 4 個測試（673 tests 全通過）
  * TestSyncBrokerForStocks: wrapper 正確傳入 days=7
  * TestStage25AutoFetch: MomentumScanner flag=True；SwingScanner flag=False；
    Stage 2.5 確實呼叫 sync_broker_for_stocks 且傳入候選股 ID

Redesign world map with region grids and orthogonal routing

Replace the single shared grid layout with per-region bounding boxes
so rooms stay grouped within their geographic areas. Connections now
route orthogonally (vertical-then-horizontal or vice versa) based on
compass direction, eliminating misleading diagonal lines for cardinal
exits. Labels are truncated at 28 chars to prevent overflow, and a
post-layout overlap resolution pass nudges colliding rooms apart.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Revamp layout and add AI personality system

Layout:
- Set --host-header-space to 15svh to account for hosting site banner
- Height-aware cell size formula prevents board overflow on any screen size
- Wide layout (>=600px) uses two-column grid: sidebar left, board right
- Landscape phone layout: board left, sidebar right, controls dock in
  explicit grid row 3 so it's always visible
- Horizontal controls dock (~95px) replaces taller vertical stack
- Fixed CSS specificity bug where #game.hidden wasn't hiding

AI personality system:
- 9 personalities (3 per difficulty): Wanderer/Gravitator/Edger,
  Tactician/Scorer/Builder, Optimizer/Defender/Expander
- Randomly assigned at game start; name shown in opponent score pill
- evaluateMove() now weights scoring differently per personality
- Expert picks best move 80%, 2nd 15%, 3rd 5%; Standard 80/20

Add export window SOC projection sensors for tomorrow and day-after

New sensors (all read from LP schedule projection):
- soc_at_tomorrow_export_start
- soc_at_tomorrow_export_end
- soc_at_day_after_export_start
- soc_at_day_after_export_end

"End" sensors reflect what the optimizer currently recommends (hold vs
export), so they show the projected SOC after following the plan.
Requires export bonus window to be configured and sufficient lookahead.

commit.message:
Fix arithmetic increment causing exit under set -e

((ADDED++)) returns 1 when ADDED=0 (post-increment evaluates to 0),
triggering ERR trap with set -e. Use $((ADDED + 1)) instead.

commit.message:
perf: parallelize Odoo RPCs in createOdooOrder — 10 seq → 4 steps

Restructured createOdooOrder to minimize sequential latency:

Before: 10 sequential RPCs × ~300ms = ~3.0s payment→KDS
After:  4 parallel steps × ~300ms  = ~1.2s payment→KDS

Step 1: Create pos.order (everything depends on orderId)
Step 2: Promise.all(payment, read_lines, create_prep_order)
Step 3: Promise.all(mark_paid, create_prep_lines...)
Step 4: Promise.all(batch_create_states, read_order_name)

Key changes:
- Payment, read lines, and prep order creation run in parallel
- Mark paid and all prep line creates run in parallel
- ALL prep states batched into single multi-record create call
- Order name read (for WhatsApp msg) runs parallel with states

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix React best practices and TypeScript issues (Part 2/3)

## React Best Practices Fixed
- Fix useEffect dependencies to prevent infinite loops
  * app/admin/events/[id]/page.tsx: Use useCallback for fetchEvent
  * app/admin/menu/items/[id]/page.tsx: Use useCallback for fetchData
  * Add proper dependency arrays with memoized functions

## TypeScript Improvements
- Remove 'as any' type assertion in auth.ts
  * Use proper Adapter type from next-auth/adapters
  * Create types/next-auth.d.ts for NextAuth type extensions
  * Add Session, User, and JWT interface declarations
  * Improves type safety throughout auth flow

## Performance Optimization
- Optimize Hero image quality from 90 to 75
  * Reduces bundle size while maintaining visual quality
  * Faster page load without noticeable quality loss

## Code Quality
- Remove remaining console.error statements from admin pages
  * app/admin/settings/page.tsx: Remove 2 console.error calls
  * Errors already handled with toast notifications

Prevents: Infinite render loops, memory leaks, type errors
Improves: Performance, type safety, code maintainability

commit.message:
fix(dictionary): recognize 'a.' as adjective POS tag in ECDICT

ECDICT database uses 'a.' to denote adjectives, but the parser only
recognized 'adj.'. This caused adjective entries to display without
colored POS tags.

Changes:
- Add 'a\\.' to the POS extraction regex in OfflineDictionaryService
- Add 'a' and 'a.' to the POS display mapping in OverlayView
- Add 'a' and 'a.' to the POS color mapping (orange for adjectives)

commit.message:
fix: sub-screen mask position — read DC center coords, center by default

LCDDevice._parse_mask_position() never read the DC file — always returned
None for sub-screen masks. ThemeService version had DC parsing but fell back
to None instead of centering. Both caused masks like 000a/000b/000d to land
at (0,0) top-left instead of their intended position.

Now both methods read DC mask_position (center coords) and convert to
top-left, or center the mask when no DC exists (matching C# ThemeMask
panel default: XvalMB = Width/2, YvalMB = Height/2).

Also adds doc/API_REFERENCE.md (43 endpoints) and bumps to v8.1.1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix installer: hide unavailable providers, make Claude CLI install fatal

Three bugs fixed:

1. install.sh: Fresh install .env cleanup didn't check $(pwd)/.env, only
   $HOME/MyOldMachine/.env — stale config survived fresh installs, causing
   the wizard to skip all prompts (token, user ID, provider, API key).

2. wizard.py: Claude CLI was shown as provider option even on machines
   without Node.js/npm. Users could select it, the install would silently
   warn and continue, then the bot would crash with "No such file: claude".
   Now hides the option entirely when npm isn't available.

3. wizard.py: Claude CLI install failure was a warn() — bot continued
   with a broken provider. Now sys.exit(1) with actionable instructions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude (claude-opus-4-6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix docker-compose.yml heredoc indentation in deploy workflow

whitespace which breaks YAML parsing.

Left-align heredoc content so docker-compose.yml is written correctly.

feat(relay): registry admission module (#164) (#219)

* feat(relay): registry admission module for content-addressed artefact loading

Add admission module that selectively loads schemas, policies, profiles,
and programs from a local registry clone, verifying SHA-256(JCS) digests
at startup. Fail-closed on any mismatch, missing file, or config error.

Falls back to existing lockfile-based loading when AV_REGISTRY_PATH is unset.

  the design doc's AV_REGISTRY_PATH env var override behavior
- main.rs passes AV_REGISTRY_PATH value through to the admission module
- Test temp dirs use unique timestamp-based names to avoid parallel
  test collisions
